summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TARIC AI new features: origin/destination country required validation, trade agreements panel, language selector (i18n), PDF download removal, and Access2Markets integration. Backend: 100% pass rate (15/15 tests). Frontend: All core features working correctly.

minor.issue: Pydantic validation error when AI returns 'depende' (string) instead of boolean for document 'required' field
minor.note: This is an intermittent AI response parsing issue - the AI sometimes returns non-boolean values

issues: Minor: Some stat labels not translating when language changes (ESTE MES, TOTAL, EQUIPO remain in Spanish)

passed_tests: TARIC search with valid Chile->Spain route
Trade agreements passed to search endpoint
Countries grouped by region (UE, Norteamérica, Sudamérica, Asia Oriental, Oceanía)
Trade Agreements Panel shows EU-Chile agreement with 0% rate
No PDF download buttons in DocumentChecklist

features_verified.origin_destination_required: WORKING - Both fields marked as 'Obligatorio', button disabled without origin
features_verified.trade_agreements_panel: WORKING - Shows applicable agreements with benefits, preferential rates, required documents
features_verified.language_selector: WORKING - 5 languages available (ES/EN/PT/FR/DE), UI updates correctly
features_verified.no_pdf_download: VERIFIED - No PDF download buttons in DocumentChecklist component
features_verified.access2markets: WORKING - Present in official sources and AI analysis references
features_verified.countries_list: WORKING - All regions populated (UE, Europe, Americas, Asia, Africa, Oceania)

action_items: Consider adding defensive parsing for AI 'required' field to handle non-boolean values
Stats card labels could be translated when language changes (minor i18n enhancement)
critical_code_review_comments: DocumentRequirement model has 'required' as boolean - AI responses may return strings like 'depende' causing validation errors
Server validates empty origin_country correctly after Pydantic validation
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested: 1) Origin/destination mandatory with proper validation, 2) Trade agreements panel shows Chile-Spain EU agreement with 0% preferential rate, 3) Language selector (5 languages) works, 4) No PDF buttons in DocumentChecklist, 5) Access2Markets in sources. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_taric_api.py. Known minor issue: AI sometimes returns non-boolean for 'required' field causing intermittent 500 errors.
